scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but omits LocalPath and PathProtocol which are part of the library. The ensure_contents default mode shown as 0o644 matches the gold standard's 420 (same value). Core ContainerPath and ensure_contents behavior is accurately described.
scores.hallucination_notes: Import path uses 'from charms.charmlibs.pathops import ContainerPath' but gold standard shows 'from charmlibs import pathops' — the 'charms.' prefix prefix may be incorrect for this library. Installation uses charmcraft.yaml/fetch-libs pattern rather than the current 'uv add charmlibs-pathops' approach.
